snippet.title: Aakhri Sawal Official Trailer | Sanjay Dutt | Namashi | Amit Sadh | Sameera Reddy | 15 May Release
snippet.description:
What happens when the truth refuses to stay buried?
Watch the trailer of #AakhriSawal ‚Äî where every answer comes at a cost.

What begins as an academic accusation soon explodes into a nationwide debate.
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who publicly challenges his mentor ‚Äî the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni ‚Äî accusing him of institutional bias.
As media outrage, political agendas, and public opinion collide, the confrontation transforms into a dangerous psychological chess match.
From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no truth is left untouched.
But beneath the arguments lies a far deeper mystery.
Why is Vicky really asking these questions?
As buried secrets begin to surface, one final question threatens to change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.
In Cinemas on 15th May

Cast
Sanjay Dutt as Professor Gopal Nadkarni
Namashi Chakraborty as Vicky Hegde
Amit Sadh as Aditya Rao
Sameera Reddy as Professor Pallavi Menon
Neetu Chandra as Kavya Rawat
Tridha Choudhary as Saara
Mrinal Kulkarni as Prabha Nadkarni
Harsimran Oberoi as Ipshita Das
Rockey Raina as Sohraab
Archana Iyer as Vicky‚Äôs Mother
Bipin Nadkarni as Bipin Chaudhary
Nikhil Nanda as M.S. Golwalkar

Crew
Directed by Abhijeet Mohan Warang
Nikhil Nanda Motion Pictures & Neem Tree Entertainment Presents
Produced by Nikhil Nanda & Sanjay Dutt
Co-Producers: Puneet Nanda, Dr. Deepak Singh, Gaurav Dubey, Ujjwal Anand
Written by Utkarsh Naithani
DOP: Stanley Mudda
Editor: Sanjay Sankla
Music: Monty Sharma
Casting: Taran Bajaj
Production Designer: Keshav Thakur
Art Director: Rakesh Sutar
Costume Design: Sachin Lovalekar
Makeup Design: Amit Ambedkar
Sound Designer: Sandip Sarkar
Executive Producer: Siddhant Sheth
Chief AD: Deeksha Rana
Action Director: Amit Naikar
DA & Script Supervisor: Himanshu Raj KanthCrew
Directed by Abhijeet Mohan Warang
Nikhil Nanda Motion Pictures & Neem Tree Entertainment Presents

snippet.title: Tera Ho Jaun | Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai | Varun Dhawan, Pooja Hegde | WNC | Stebin, Jonita, Vayu
snippet.description:
Feel the magic of love with Tera Ho Jaun from Hai Jawani Toh Ishq Hona Hai, featuring the beautiful chemistry of Varun Dhawan and Pooja Hegde. ‚ù§Ô∏è‚ú®Sung by Stebin Ben and Jonita Gandhi, this romantic love song is composed by White Noise Collectives with heartfelt lyrics by Vayu.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

#HaiJawaniTohIshqHonaHai in cinemas on 5th June 2026.

Singer: Stebin Ben & Jonita Gandhi
Lyrics: Vayu
Music: White Noise Collectives

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official New Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan‚Äôs next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX¬Æ film technology. The film brings Homer‚Äôs foundational saga to IMAX¬Æ film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong‚Äôo, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: Bandar Teaser + Kartavya Trailer REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Bandar Teaser + Kartavya Trailer Review by Deeksha Sharma. Bandar Movie Featuring Bobby Deol & Sanya Malhotra Directed by Anurag Kashyap is based on real life Crime thriller which shook bollywood film industry whereas Kartavya Trailer Featuring Saif Ali Khan on Netflix is a Hunt Thriller for Truth which uncovers a dark story with New Villain Lallantop Saurabh Dwivedi. Bandar Teaser Review & Kartavya Trailer Netflix backed by Shahrukh Khan & Red Chillies Reaction would be shared in this Video. Bobby Deol 2.0 with Director Anurag Kashyap or Saif Ali Khan in Action Thriller- What are you most excited for? Do leave Comments below.

#Bandar #BandarTeaser #Kartavya

Experience the ultimate expression of love! ‚ù§Ô∏è Sabba teams up with the sensational Pranjal Dahiya for "Sach Jani," a soulful masterpiece from the hit album 'Proud.'

snippet.description:
üíñ Tujh Sang Preet Lagai Sajna | Heart Touching Romantic Song 2026 üíñ

snippet.title: ý§Æý•àý§Ç ý§§ý•áý§∞ý•á ý§™ý•çý§Øý§æý§∞ ý§Æý•áý§Ç ý§™ý§æý§óý§≤ | Prem Bandhan | Kishore Kumar | Lata Mangeshkar Songs
snippet.description:
üé∂ Immerse yourself in the timeless romance of Kishore Kumar and Lata Mangeshkar with 'Main Tere Pyar Mein Pagal' from the movie Prem Bandhan! Relive the magic of 1979, as these legendary voices weave a tale of love and longing. Let the nostalgic melodies transport you to an era of pure emotions and heartfelt expressions.

Experience the golden era of Bollywood with this enchanting duet, a testament to the unparalleled artistry of Kishore Da and Lata Ji. Feel the depth of emotion in every note as they serenade your soul with their unforgettable voices. This song is a treasure trove of memories, capturing the essence of love in its purest form.



Credits :

Song: Main Tere Pyar Mein Pagal
Album: Prem Bandhan
Artist: Kishore Kumar | Lata Mangeshkar
Music Director: Laxmikant-Pyarelal
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 


Lyrics :

Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein
Pagal aise ghumti hoon
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Sawan ko dhundti hoom
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Jab jab tu chhup jati hai
In phoolo ki galiyo mein
Aur chatakne lagti hai
Kitni kaliya kaliyo mein
Main tera pata sabhi se
Aise puchhta hu jaise main koi
Bhula rahi manjil ko dhundata hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Aankhe aankhe
Mere chehre pe
Teri thari thari do aankhe
Kitni gehari jhil hai ye
Jhil se gehari do aankhe
Main teri in aankho mein
Aise dubti hu jaise main koi
Tuti naiya manjhe ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Pagal pagal pagal


Tu ho na ho aankho mein
Rahti teri surat hai
Ye man prem ka mandir hai
Jisme teri ye murat hai
Main teri is murat ko
Aise pujti hoon jaise main koi
Vyakul radha mohan ko dhundti hoon
Main tere pyar mein pagal
Aise ghoomta hoon
Jaise main koi pyasa badal
Jaise main koi pyasi badli
Barkha ko dhundata hoon
Sawan ko dhundti hoon
Barkha ko dhundata hoon.

snippet.title: BAVA BAVA Lyrical | CITYLIGHTS | Vinay Rajkumar | Monisha Vijaykumar | Charan Raj | Vijaya Kumar
snippet.description:
üî• Warning: Extreme Mass Alert! üö® BAVA BAVA is finally here
Presenting The BAVA BAVA Lyrical from the Movie #CITYLIGHTS  Starring : Vinay Rajkumar, Monisha Vijaykumar & Others Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!! 
-----------------------------------------
#CITYLIGHTS #bavabava #citylightsmovie #vinayrajkumar #anandaudio  
#duniyavijaykumar  #charanraj #monishavijaykumar  #youtube #ankithkumar  
-----------------------------------------
Lyrics by Ankith Kumar 
Follow on: https://www.instagram.com/ankith_kumarr/

Lyrics:
Eh Bava Bava Ba Inge pesu
BA BA Black sheepu Baduta piecuuu
Shirki savasu shekmana kotte
Shekna ka un lifuuu bod bod motte

Thinruk kali ille Biludana oka
Ing Namravre namruku oikrudu pakka
Nigradbeda magne kithakthin pukka
Nodoke area dal Nan obne sukka

Eh patte Kya re khana kaya 
Mamu ka dukhan meh by two chaya
Pileko hojata dimaku Maya 
Shivajinagar meh nalli ka paya

Bat alli bitre odyod onde shotuu
Nenskobek makla niv harishchandra ghatu
Touch madthini anod beda ma thougtuu
Vade paisa aksthini kalskodla date uuu...

Odu odu odu tirgbeda hinde 
Yamunange kansthini annamun munde
Yak hutde antha ning ansbeko munde
Good morning helalla kaldoithya Sunday 

Thilkondu  fight madu alka nan magne
Baik bandid boglmana badko ya magne
En thanteg barmana udrushu pallu
Ammaniiiii bandaka pullu

Nangle niyathkal manshru 
Eppunu engluke ben hinde vakraga sooori
Niyath kala illa  illi nambidake jothe idu game adi akidu choori

Thinrudu sheesh kali baluk mav Adada etu 
dodthale ethnappa kudkurdu rate uuuu...
Thale kedskolalla nanu hidkyoke slate uuu
Estojana ote urig madode hate uuu

Onak sheesh thindotu daulattu peshii
Draggeruu nugshanaka barodilla teshii
Sadilde nin body Kalsthini kaashi
Gothilde hutidya gothilla Raashi

Parents ge yavathu ursbeda otte 
Avr mathu kellilla jail uta thatte
Sirki savasu ni shekmana kotte 
Sheknaka un lifuuu bod bod motte 

Eh Bava Bava Ba Inge pesu
BA BA Black sheepu Baduta piecuuu
Shirki savasu shekmana kotte
Shekna un lifuuu bod bod motte

Thinruk kali ille Biludana oka
Ing Namravre namruku oikrudu pakka
Nigradbeda magne kithakthin pukka
Nodoke area dal Nan obne sukka
----------

snippet.title: Can't Leave the Red Circle in Minecraft!!
snippet.description:
Today, a bunch of evil villagers have kidnapped our families! Now, they're forcing us to survive a massive zombie swarm if we want to save them, but we're not allowed the leave these red circles! We don't have a choice, we have to create security houses capable of surviving the zombie attack in order to save our families!

We hope you enjoy our videos! Have a great day!

en.description:
Today, a bunch of evil villagers have kidnapped our families! Now, they're forcing us to survive a massive zombie swarm if we want to save them, but we're not allowed the leave these red circles! We don't have a choice, we have to create security houses capable of surviving the zombie attack in order to save our families!

We hope you enjoy our videos! Have a great day! 

Maizen Merchandise ‚ñ∫ https://shop-maizen.myspreadshop.com/

snippet.description:
my last video...
Nahi socha tha ki kabhi aisi video banani padegi... üíî
Socha tha ye mera aakhri video hoga, par sachai saamne lana zaroori tha. Jisne ye copyright strike di hai, usne na sirf channel ko 7 din mein delete karwane ki dhamki di hai, balki peeche se abuses bhi kiye hain. Is video mein saara sach aur unka double face expose kiya hai.

Mera hamesha se focus aap logo ke liye best content lane par raha hai, par ab aage kya hoga mujhe khud nahi pata. Poori situation video mein explain ki hai. Agar aap logo ne hamesha support kiya hai, toh aaj aapki sabse zyada zaroorat hai.

snippet.title: Paal Dabba - Psilovibin (Music Video) || Prod. Foxn
snippet.description:
psilovibin

This song is about my journey from a quiet kid to finally be able to express myself. I‚Äôve replaced
doubt with discipline and hard work. It isn't luck; it‚Äôs about learning from mistakes, staying true to myself, and finally owning my own path.

snippet.title: ý§Æý•áý§∞ý§æ ý§öý§æý§Åý§¶ ý§Æý•Åý§ùý•á ý§Üý§Øý§æ ý§πý•à ý§®ý•õý§∞ | Mr. Aashiq | Kumar Sanu Songs | Saif Ali Khan | Twinkle Khanna
snippet.description:
üé∂ Dive into the soulful world of Kumar Sanu with this timeless classic, 'Mera Chand Mujhe Aaya Hai Nazar' from the movie Mr. Aashiq! Relive the magic of 90s Bollywood romance with this unforgettable melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Kumar Sanu's voice is pure emotion, weaving stories of affection and heartbreak that resonate even today. His contribution to Indian music is immeasurable, and this song is a testament to his incredible talent.

This video features the beautifully crafted song 'Mera Chand Mujhe Aaya Hai Nazar', transporting you back to a golden era of Bollywood music. Experience the charm, the passion, and the sheer artistry of this iconic song.



Credits :

Song: Mera Chand Mujhe Aaya Hai Nazar
Album: Mr. Aashiq
Artist: Kumar Sanu
Music Director: Jatin-Lalit
Lyricist: Indiwar 



Lyrics :

Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Chhaya hai nasha meri aankho par
Chhaya hai nasha meri aankho par
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Aye raat zara tham tham ke gujar
Mera chand mujhe aaya hai nazar


Mere dil mein hai arma kai kai

Loo mari namdella onde guri
Field alli hosa thali bandaithu side‚Äôig sari
Keluskolole mari kodtivi thotapuri
Hachaitu benki kidi thakatidre neen thadi

Shuruvaytu shukradese, tumbaytu khali kise.
Guri itre misse illa kaldogtiya keli kathe

Kanasina baagilu teredaagide, kaaytidda jeevana kaiyallide.
Naav nintagide, field set aagide, yaavan bandrunu kai kattakode.

Salige suligege kaarana,
Tale odsi beelisbeku gaalana,
Dhandeli dhumki tilibeku aalana.
Aalordenee yeliyodu kaalana.

Bandide kale paal marketige
Beda bhava gotilla sarikkige,
Mai tumba gathide, 
Cold vibe mast ide
Full on sokkide
Noorik noor kick-ide.

Smooth aagide slow alla ma
Time aagidre madbeku calm-m
Onagide chigru hasragide.
Beldu nintovn helkolakke kaaytide maam.

Chacha ond dose packet

Nannadeega marukatte gathinalli kalu itte,
Benna hinde bandavara neralige prana kotte,
Pitipiti kitikiti maduvara sidigitte,
Maathaliro mitigala mootekatti daanakotte,
Hanagala holeyanu hidiyalu anekatte,
Kattikondu kedavide bekagilla katakate,
Hasivige hedarlilla esto dina khali tatte,
Kattitta sittaneega bhajarige haribitte.

Thooka irod mamuli, aadu prathi mathali,
Hinde inda bandu kunthidivi front seat ali.

Loo mari namdella onde guri
Field alli hosa thali bandaithu side‚Äôig sari
Keluskolole mari kodtivi thotapuri
Hachaitu benki kidi thakatidre neen thadi

Nintogidda time iga ododikke ready
Nilsakke yaar kaiyyal agodilla nadi
Pasar agbek hesariga prathi ooru keri
Henge belithivi yella gang jothe seri

Naavenu Yarginta kammi illa Yarginta dummy illa 
Munde itta hejjena hinde yendu idodilla
Yaar maatu kelodilla kelu anta helodilla
Sari daaril hogodikke samajane sarigilla

Kanasina baagilu teredaagide, kaaytidda jeevana kaiyallide.
Naav nintagide, field set aagide, yaavan bandrunu kai kattakode.

Salige suligege kaarana,
Tale odsi beelisbeku gaalana,
Dhandeli dhumki tilibeku aalana.
Aalordenee yeliyodu kaalana.

Bandide kale paal marketige
Beda bhava gotilla sarikkige,
Mai tumba gathide, 
Cold vibe mast ide
Full on sokkide
Noorik noor kick-ide.

Smooth aagide slow alla ma
Time aagidre madbeku calm-m
Onagide chigru hasragide.
Beldu nintovn helkolakke kaaytide maam.

Chacha ond dose packet

Nannadeega marukatte gathinalli kalu itte,
Benna hinde bandavara neralige prana kotte,
Pitipiti kitikiti maduvara sidigitte,
Maathaliro mitigala mootekatti daanakotte,
Hanagala holeyanu hidiyalu anekatte,
Kattikondu kedavide bekagilla katakate,
Hasivige hedarlilla esto dina khali tatte,
Kattitta sittaneega bhajarige haribitte.

Thooka irod mamuli, aadu prathi mathali,
Hinde inda bandu kunthidivi front seat ali.

Loo mari namdella onde guri
Field alli hosa thali bandaithu side‚Äôig sari
Keluskolole mari kodtivi thotapuri
Hachaitu benki kidi thakatidre neen thadi

Nintogidda time iga ododikke ready
Nilsakke yaar kaiyyal agodilla nadi
Pasar agbek hesariga prathi ooru keri
Henge belithivi yella gang jothe seri

Naavenu Yarginta kammi illa Yarginta dummy illa 
Munde itta hejjena hinde yendu idodilla
Yaar maatu kelodilla kelu anta helodilla
Sari daaril hogodikke samajane sarigilla


Label: Saregama India Limited, A RPSG Group Company

Finding 1000 Missing Minecraft Players


Unstable SMP Members
‚ûú @wemmbumc

‚ûú @Spokeishere

Features: @jamatopecan @MapiccMc @jumperwho @DylPicklee @cookiebunsquat 

music: 
Ivory /  @ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
Christopher Larkin
DM DOKURO /  @DMDOKURO

Laura Shigihara /  @supershigi  
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music

snippet.title: Tere Bagair Hi Acche The Hum üíî Ye Dil Ab Maan Gaya | Soulful Sufi Qawwali | New Sad Qawwali 2026
snippet.description:
"Tere Bagair Hi Acche The Hum üíî Ye Dil Ab Maan Gaya‚Äù ek dil ko chhoo lene wala soulful Sufi Qawwali ishq song hai jo mohabbat ke dard, judaai ki takleef aur tanha raaton ki kahani bayan karta hai. Yeh gaana un logon ke liye hai jinhone kabhi sachcha ishq kiya hai aur usme toot gaye hain.

Is qawwali mein ek aashiq ke dil ka haal bayan hota hai jo apni mehbooba ki yaadon se bhaagna chahta hai, lekin har raat woh yaadein usse aur gehra zakhm de jaati hain. Sharab sirf ek bahana hai, asal mein woh apne dard ko sulane ki koshish karta hai.

Yeh gaana Sufi andaaz mein ishq-e-majazi se ishq-e-haqeeqi tak ka safar bhi dikhata hai. Jab duniya ke pyaar mein insaan toot jaata hai, tab woh Rab ki taraf mudta hai. Har lafz, har sur aur har ehsaas is gaane mein dil ki gehraiyon se nikla hai.

Agar aapko sad songs, qawwali, ya Sufi music pasand hai, toh yeh gaana aapke dil ko zaroor chhoo lega.

üëç Like karein
üí¨ Comment karke apni feelings share karein
üîî Channel ko subscribe karein aur bell icon dabayein

Lyrics:

Kabhi-kabhi‚Ä¶ Hum jis insaan ke liye sab kuch chhod dete hain‚Ä¶ Wahi humein ye sikha jaata hai‚Ä¶ Ki hum uske bina hi behtar the‚Ä¶"


"Maine socha tha‚Ä¶ Tu meri duniya hai‚Ä¶ Par sach ye tha‚Ä¶ Main teri duniya mein kahin tha hi nahi‚Ä¶ Tu gaya‚Ä¶ to dard hua‚Ä¶ Par usi dard ne bataya‚Ä¶ Ki hum tere bagair hi acche the‚Ä¶"


"Tere saath hanste hue bhi roya hoon main, Tere bina ab sukoon se soya hoon main‚Ä¶ Ajeeb hai ye ishq ka fasana bhi, Tujhe paakar khoya‚Ä¶ tujhe khokar paaya hoon main‚Ä¶"


Tere bagair acche the hum‚Ä¶ Ye dil ab maan gaya‚Ä¶ Tu tha to khoye hue the, Tu gaya to jaan gaya‚Ä¶


Tere saath har lamha bhaari tha, Par maine use pyaar kaha‚Ä¶ Teri har khamoshi ko maine, Apna ikraar kaha‚Ä¶
Maine khud ko tujh mein khoya, Har sapna tujhpe vaar diya‚Ä¶ Tune badle mein kya diya, Bas ek toota sa sansaar diya‚Ä¶


"Log kehte hain‚Ä¶ Mohabbat sukoon deti hai‚Ä¶ Par shayad‚Ä¶ Galat insaan se mohabbat‚Ä¶ Sukoon cheen leti hai‚Ä¶"


Tere bagair acche the hum‚Ä¶ Ab ye ehsaas hua‚Ä¶ Tere saath rehkar hi kyun, Dil itna udaas hua‚Ä¶


Ab jo tu nahi hai paas mere, Saansein bhi halki lagti hain‚Ä¶ Tere diye hue saare zakhm, Ab aadat si lagti hain‚Ä¶
Maine khud se rishta joda, Dil ko phir samjhaya hai‚Ä¶ Tu ek sabak tha zindagi ka, Jisne mujhe banaya hai‚Ä¶


"Tu mila bhi to dard dekar, Tu gaya bhi to sukoon dekar‚Ä¶ Ab na koi shikayat tujhse, Main jee raha hoon khud ko lekar‚Ä¶"


Tere jhooth pe yakeen kiya, Har dhokhe ko apna liya‚Ä¶ Maine tujhe apna samjha, Tune mujhe hi gair kiya‚Ä¶
Ab jo door hoon tujhse, To sach saaf dikhai deta hai‚Ä¶ Tu kabhi mera tha hi nahi, Ye dil ab samajh leta hai‚Ä¶


"Kabhi-kabhi‚Ä¶ Kisi ka chale jaana‚Ä¶ Tujhe todta nahi‚Ä¶ Tujhe sach dikha jaata hai‚Ä¶"


"Tu tha to main khoya tha‚Ä¶ Tu gaya to main paaya hoon‚Ä¶ Tere bagair hi sahi‚Ä¶ Ab khud mein samaya hoon‚Ä¶"


Tere bagair acche the hum‚Ä¶ Ab dil ye kehta hai‚Ä¶ Tu ek beeta hua kissa hai, Jo ab na rehta hai‚Ä¶
Ab na koi dard baaki hai, Na koi adhoori raat‚Ä¶ Main khud mein hi poora hoon, Yahi hai meri aukaat‚Ä¶

"Kuch rishte‚Ä¶ Khatam nahi hote‚Ä¶ Bas humein‚Ä¶ Khud se milakar‚Ä¶ Chale jaate hain‚Ä¶"
